caption: In a wood-paneled room with horizontal slats on the walls, a small audience sits facing two men standing behind podiums. One man wears a blue shirt and glasses, while the other wears a dark vest over a white shirt and glasses. The audience members are seen from behind, wearing a variety of clothing, including a maroon jacket, a yellow shirt, and a white sweater. A white rectangular logo with the text "ORCA" is visible on the right side of the scene. Across the sequence, the individuals remain largely stationary, with only slight movements as the men at the podiums speak. The man in the dark vest gestures slightly with his hands while addressing the group. The lighting is consistent throughout, and the composition of the people and the environment remains unchanged between the frames.
